allow: Bash(curl -sf -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"sql": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS RISK_MATRIX \(id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, desk VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, risk_type VARCHAR\(50\) NOT NULL, score DECIMAL\(5,2\) NOT NULL\)"}' "http://localhost:8081/api/v1/target/schema/execute")

Bash(curl -sf -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"widgetId":"WD_RISK_HEATMAP","targetDb":"TARGET_DB","querySql":"SELECT desk, risk_type, score FROM RISK_MATRIX ORDER BY desk, risk_type","dynamicConfig":"{\\"chart_type\\":\\"heatmap\\",\\"title\\":\\"Risk Score Matrix by Desk\\",\\"xField\\":\\"desk\\",\\"yField\\":\\"risk_type\\",\\"valueField\\":\\"score\\",\\"xLabel\\":\\"Trading Desk\\",\\"yLabel\\":\\"Risk Category\\"}"}' http://localhost:8081/api/v1/admin/widgets)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(' -', w['widgetId']\) for w in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; ws=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(ws\)} widgets'\); [print\(' -', w['widgetId']\) for w in ws]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('uiSchema:', r['uiSchema']\); print\('rows:', len\(r['data']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('chart_type:', r['uiSchema']['chart_type']\); print\('indicators:', r['uiSchema']['indicators']\); print\('rows:', len\(r['data']\)\)")
